export function evalComputed(formula,vals){try{if(formula.startsWith('SUM(')){const key=formula.slice(4,-1);const arr=vals[key];if(Array.isArray(arr))return arr.reduce((s,v)=>s+(parseFloat(v)||0),0).toFixed(2);return'—';}const expr=formula.replace(/([a-z_]+)/g,k=>"(parseFloat(vals['".concat(k,"'])||0)"));// eslint-disable-next-line no-new-func
const result=new Function('vals',"try{const x=".concat(expr,";return isFinite(x)?x.toFixed(2):'\u2014'}catch(e){return '\u2014'}"))(vals);return result;}catch(_unused){return'—';}}
